resource.chars: The Solid Rocket Boosters (SRBs), manufactured by Northrop Grumman, are five-segment units that provide 75% of the rocket's thrust at liftoff; these boosters are not reusable and contain steel casings with segments that flew on missions as far back as 1982 (STS-5).
